{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032220040526A33119CECC06F41DB9"}"},"total":33},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7407112769403568921","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"有很多很创新，意想不到的剧情。主角性格也很好，乐子人。当然也非常的好磕。主角很强，看着也很爽，其他的角色也没有削的太弱，也会开挂，大人平等照顾到每一个角色。大人很厉害，写得很好，更新也很够吃。大人简直就是小说界掌管剧情的神，不说了，上去舔一口"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1724605221,"group_id":"7392502298074696728","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单纯爱嬤主角，all主角（所以副cp给我滚开，纯纯死宅二次元","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nzo8bl1ojDu9RDalJCkmR2QVBMSrB6byXQr7BH5JYquv","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/c99e4a3a6d2e48c694737324c2229573~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709689&x-signature=phWsUgcNWoRogW8eBYATiCKs1uQ%3D","user_id":"2529305197285022","user_name":"渊旺觉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2529305197285022","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7392502298074696728","book_info":{"abstract":"团宠+作精+万人迷（综漫大乱斗，网王，柯南，文豪野犬，食戟之灵，美食的俘虏，鬼灭，还有什么没想好，脑洞开到哪里写到哪里）
目标是?遍综漫帅哥

黑羽快斗：我的宝贝少爷

ten_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":17948,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1800},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7401176636032893721","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"嘿嘿，漫综大乱炖（现在出现的有网球王子，名侦探柯南，美食猎人，）主线是网球王子，剧情大改，主角穿越带系统，打破了青春学院的网球阵容，挖了手冢，大石，菊丸还有一个其他学校的亚久津，主角无敌，全国大赛的剧情发展很快，主角团的成长更是快，主角的性格格外的幽默活泼，捣蛋娇气，真的很好看[送心][送心][送心]","text_exts":[{"e":19,"s":15,"text":"网球王子","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%BD%91%E7%90%83%E7%8E%8B%E5%AD%90&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177418104506F41DB9%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227401176636032893721%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227392502298074696728%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%BD%91%E7%90%83%E7%8E%8B%E5%AD%90%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":25,"s":20,"text":"名侦探柯南","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%90%8D%E4%BE%A6%E6%8E%A2%E6%9F%AF%E5%8D%97&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177418104506F41DB9%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227401176636032893721%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227392502298074696728%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%90%8D%E4%BE%A6%E6%8E%A2%E6%9F%AF%E5%8D%97%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":30,"s":26,"text":"美食猎人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%BE%8E%E9%A3%9F%E7%8C%8E%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177418104506F41DB9%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227401176636032893721%2
